Thought.name: Cawdor: Plot Identification & Residential Principle
Thought.label: Brownfield, lapsed consent (32 units), Victorian arch retention. Residential principle established.

Thought.name: Cawdor: Design Brief — 25 Homes, Arch Retained, Plot Passport
Thought.label: Maximise value per unit (not units per hectare). Custom/self-build. 4 Almshouse affordable.

Thought.name: Cawdor: Planning Strategy — Malmesbury Precedent, SB Act, NDP
Thought.label: Self-Build Act tailwind. Malmesbury appeal precedent. Ross-on-Wye NDP support. Data room complete.

Thought.name: Cawdor: House Types — Potton Catalogue Adaptation [NEEDS INPUT]
Thought.label: Detached/semi/terrace mix, size range, Potton model numbers. Awaiting specification from Steve/Roger.

Thought.name: Cawdor: Potton Timber Frame Procurement
Thought.label: Potton (est. 1964, ex-Kingspan). 60yr planning auth, 50yr mortgage lender recognition. Frame spec for Cawdor.

Thought.name: Cawdor: Tier 1 Supply Chain Map [NEEDS INPUT]
Thought.label: Groundworks, roofing, windows, M&E, insulation, cladding. Named contractors required.

Thought.name: Cawdor: BIM Model & Component Library [NEEDS INPUT]
Thought.label: Software (Revit/ArchiCAD), LOD, Digital Twin integration. Status and contents required.

Thought.name: Cawdor: Material Specification & Performance Targets [NEEDS INPUT]
Thought.label: Part L / Future Homes Standard. Air tightness target. SAP rating. Foundation type. Timber standard.

Thought.name: Cawdor: Build Programme & Critical Path [NEEDS INPUT]
Thought.label: Gantt chart. Sequence: foundations, frame erection, first fix, completion. Duration per unit.

Thought.name: Cawdor: Site Logistics — Arch Access, Shuttle Traffic, Crane Plan
Thought.label: Signal-controlled access through Victorian arch. Transport statement modelled. SuDS drainage.

Thought.name: Cawdor: QA & Inspection Protocol [NEEDS INPUT]
Thought.label: Building control route, NHBC/warranty, stage inspections, air tightness test, EPC target.

Thought.name: Cawdor: Handover Protocol [NEEDS INPUT]
Thought.label: Completion package: manuals, defects liability, snagging, homeowner induction.

Thought.name: Cawdor: Post-Occupancy Evaluation [NEEDS INPUT]
Thought.label: POE metrics: actual vs design energy, occupant satisfaction, defect rates. Intervals: 3m, 12m, 3yr.

Thought.name: Cawdor: Digital Twin — Lifetime Data Asset [NEEDS INPUT]
Thought.label: BIM geometry, material specs, M&E layout, warranty dates. Handed to homeowner at completion.

Thought.name: Cawdor: Project Economics — £13.8m GDV, 25% Margin, Going-Direct Delta
Thought.label: £13.8m GDV, £10.3m costs, £3.5m profit, ~25% margin on GDV, ~34% on cost. Post-consent land: ~£1.4m.
